productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Girls Lets Catch Them Yellow Top
description: Composition Yellow top made of 100% cotton, has mock layered sleeves with a short yellow sleeve and long orange sleeve, v-neck with orange insert, graphic print on the front and vents at sides at hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash warm Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Warm iron on reverse; do not iron on print It's all fun and games in this orange top from Green Gold's chhota bheem collection. The bright colours and cute pictures of the Chhota Bheem characters make this the perfect tee for your little girl. Crafted from pure cotton, this top offers exemplary comfort. Team it with denim trousers, shorts or skirts.
